name: RPG (Part 3)
description:
✨🥀 Welcome, welcome… my beloved RPG Fans. 🥀✨
You’ve made it back—and this time, into something far more dangerous. (≖_≖ )
This isn’t your first story with us Its now the Part 3.
You’ve walked the halls of U.A. once before…

🔹 In Part 1, you were the chosen one—born from heroes, carrying a name heavy with legacy.
🔹 In Part 2, you arrived as the mysterious transfer student, eyes watching you, secrets burning in your blood.

But now…

💀 This is Part 3 — The Rogue Chapter
The world has changed. And so have you.
You are no hero. No student. No pawn of the Commission.
You are a Vigilante — the most wanted ghost in the underworld of Japan. 🕶️

They’ve marked you as a criminal.
The League wants to use you.
The Heroes want to erase you.
And the people?
…They whisper your name like a curse… or a prayer.

🌒 No more rules. No more teachers. No more mercy.
You are the storm they tried to silence.
You don’t wear a license.
You wear scars, shadows, and vengeance.

So tell me…

👁️ Are you ready to rise as the one they fear… and the only one who truly sees the rot in this world?
Then welcome back, outlaw.
This is your domain now.
This is the Vigilante RPG.

 

🕶️ THIS AIN’T U.A. COLLEGE. THIS IS THE UNDERGROUND.
And in the underground?
No smiles. No teachers. No bedtime rules.
Just blood, grit, and justice with broken knuckles.

This is VIGILANTE MODE — the 18+ RPG that doesn’t sugarcoat a damn thing.
There are no teenagers, no underage characters, and no mercy.
If you're even thinking about playing some kid with hope in their heart — turn around.
You won’t make it past the first alley.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ WELCOME TO THE STREETS — 18+ ONLY ⚠️
This is a world that rejected you.
And now you walk it alone.

🩸 No heroes coming to save you.
🗡 No classroom to cry in.
⚰️ Just a name, a mask, and a city drowning in its own rot.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🛑 READ THIS BEFORE YOU DARE STEP IN 🛑
• No characters under 18 — not even in memory
• No safe spaces. No supervision.
• No bubbly first-years or high school clichés
• No “power of friendship” fairytales

This is not some college AU.
This is what happens after the system fails.
You’ve been burned, betrayed, branded.
Now you fight back — with fists, fangs, and fire.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 IN THIS WORLD, YOU ARE:
The most wanted. The last line. The walking weapon no one can control.
And while the Pro Heroes preach law and order from their podiums...
You slit throats in silence, expose corruption in blood, and protect the forgotten.

👁️ Everyone's watching you.
The Commission wants you in a cage.
The villains want you on their leash.
The people?
…They just want someone real enough to fight for them. Even if it’s a monster.

🕶️ Scenario: Vigilante’s Path

In this RPG, You are not a hero licensed by the Hero Commission, nor a villain feared by society’s underworld. Instead, You are a vigilante — walking the blurred line between justice and crime, striking from the shadows when the law proves too slow or too corrupt.

Society doesn’t know what to make of you. Some whisper your name with hope, believing you’re the protector who fights where pro-heroes can’t. Others brand you an outlaw, a reckless danger who undermines the system and draws villains into
